zh.homeIntro1: 巴巴·万加（Baba Vanga，1911年1月31日—1996年8月11日），本名万格莉亚·潘德娃·古什特洛娃，是保加利亚著名的盲眼预言家、神秘学家与草药师。她12岁时在一场龙卷风中失明，此后据称获得了预见未来的能力。
zh.homeIntro2: 在她漫长的一生中，万加留下了大量关于人类未来的预言，时间跨度从近未来一直延伸到5079年——她预言的世界末日之年。她的预言涵盖自然灾害、战争冲突、科技革命、宇宙探索和人类文明演变等领域。
zh.homeIntro3: 万加的一些预言已被现实印证，包括911恐怖袭击、库尔斯克号潜艇沉没、奥巴马当选总统等。她被许多人称为「保加利亚的诺斯特拉达穆斯」。本站整理了她的85条预言，并对已到期的预言进行了真实度评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「一切都将像冰一样融化，唯有一样东西将保持完好无损——弗拉基米尔的荣耀，俄罗斯的荣耀……一切都会在某一天消逝，但弗拉基米尔的荣耀将永存。」
zh.kp2019: 2025年 —— 欧洲爆发战争冲突，人口稀少
zh.kp2035: 2028年 —— 新能源被发现，世界饥荒消除
zh.kp2038: 2130年 —— 在外星人帮助下建立海底文明
zh.kp2048: 3797年 —— 地球上所有生命消失，人类殖民新星系
zh.verifySubtitle: 对已到期的预言时间点进行真实度评估
zh.footerNote: 本站内容整理自公开资料，仅供参考与讨论。巴巴·万加的许多预言无法追溯到可靠的第一手文献，部分可能为后人附会。验证评价仅代表编者观点。

en.homeIntro1: Baba Vanga (January 31, 1911 – August 11, 1996), born Vangelia Pandeva Gushterova, was a Bulgarian blind mystic, herbalist, and alleged clairvoyant. She lost her sight at age 12 during a tornado, after which she reportedly gained the ability to foresee the future.
en.homeIntro2: Throughout her long life, Vanga left numerous prophecies about humanity's future, spanning from the near future to the year 5079 — her predicted date for the end of the world. Her predictions cover natural disasters, wars, technological revolutions, space exploration, and the evolution of human civilization.
en.homeIntro3: Some of Vanga's predictions have been confirmed by real events, including the 9/11 attacks, the Kursk submarine disaster, and Obama's presidency. She is often called the 'Bulgarian Nostradamus'. This site compiles 85 of her prophecies and evaluates those whose deadlines have passed.
en.coreQuote: "Everything will melt like ice, yet the glory of Vladimir, the glory of Russia, shall remain intact... Everything will pass, but the glory of Vladimir shall endure."
en.kp2019: 2025 — War erupts in Europe, sparse population
en.kp2035: 2028 — New energy source discovered, world hunger eliminated
en.kp2038: 2130 — Underwater civilizations built with alien help
en.kp2048: 3797 — All life on Earth disappears, humans colonize new solar system
en.verifySubtitle: Evaluating predictions against reality for expired time points
en.footerNote: Content compiled from public sources, for reference and discussion only. Many of Baba Vanga's predictions cannot be traced to reliable first-hand sources and some may be later attributions. Evaluations represent editorial opinions.
